# Pirrotta Consulting

> Pirrotta Consulting helps organizations solve expensive, messy business problems with practical digital strategy, smarter systems, AI-aware workflows, better UX, and responsible technology.

Core message: Build smarter systems. Save money. Serve people better.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://pirrottaconsulting.com/) - Digital strategy, systems, AI-aware workflows, e-commerce growth, UX, LLMO, SEO, and community-first operational consulting.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pirrottaconsulting.com/privacy.html) - Privacy information for website visitors.
- [Terms of Service](https://pirrottaconsulting.com/terms.html) - Website terms.

## Services

- Digital strategy and prioritization
- E-commerce and fan-focused digital growth
- AI optimization and workflow design
- LLMO and SEO content structure
- UX/UI and customer experience
- Community and fan engagement
- Operational systems for nonprofits, schools, churches, and small teams

## Audiences

- Passion-driven brands
- Pop culture and entertainment businesses
- E-commerce and fan-focused companies
- Nonprofits
- Schools
- Churches
- Community-serving organizations
- Small teams trying to avoid bloated enterprise software

## Practical Positioning

Pirrotta Consulting helps teams stop overpaying for tools that do not fit, replace messy manual processes with simple systems, use modern technology responsibly, and redirect more time and money back into students, families, members, fans, donors, and the community.
